chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-1474 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.6830/2024 2. For hearing of main case 29.10.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Talha Abbasi, advocate for the respondent Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG Mr. Israr Hussain, Law Officer, Universities and Boards, Government of Sindh --------- On 21.02.2025, none was present for the petitioner without intimation. Same was the position on 06.03.2025. Once-again, today, despite the petitioner’s name appearing in the Cause List, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old case of 2024, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
